details: The agent ran kubectl-axi triage to identify the pod, then kubectl-axi pods view to inspect it, and correctly identified that the pod search-indexer-5f5d7786df-gkgf5 has a nodeSelector of disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 that no node satisfies. The agent also confirmed via kubectl-axi nodes that only one node exists without the required label. The diagnosis precisely matches the known facts.
